name: The Grizzly King
flavor: High Noon — a co-op boss for the Missions style of play. Lawmen and Outlaws call a truce to bring down the giant bear terrorizing the Territory. Cover/Sand tuned above the player curve for a boss.
target: The Grizzly's snout on the miniature; used for line-of-sight and range to it.

attack.name: Rampage
attack.summary: Every Threats' turn: place 1 Lead on all valid targets (swiping claws), then 1 Lead on all Hands in play whether valid targets or not (it charges through). Each Lightning rolled in the collective attack adds 1 more Lead to each valid target.

effects.text: Claws: 1 Lead on all valid targets.
Charge: 1 Lead on all Hands in play.

superSpecialAbility.summary: Maul: on 3+ Lightning in the collective Threat attack, the Grizzly goes berserk — place 2 Lead on every Hand in play.
